package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceTemplateExecuteToStringThenWrite() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_framework_performance_template_execute_to_string_then_write"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag template rendering to strings before writing to the response writer."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
